projects.title: End-to-End AI Twitter Influencer
projects.description: A fully autonomous AI persona that learns your style, researches trending topics, and generates optimized content to grow your social presence.
features: Style Learning: Mimics your unique voice
Trend Research: Real-time analysis of trending topics
Autonomous Generation: Creates and schedules optimized tweets
Engagement Analytics: Improves based on performance data

projects.title: Openclaw-like Telegram AI Assistant
projects.description: A secure, multi-tool Telegram bot that executes complex workflows using browser automation and third-party integrations.
features: Multi-Tool Connectivity: Google Workspace, Slack, Twitter
Browser Integration: Executes web-based tasks autonomously

projects.title: Ultimate Self-Improving AI Sales Agent
projects.description: A fully autonomous, self-optimizing sales machine powered by Auto-Research and omni-channel connectivity.
features: Omni-channel Support: Outreach via WhatsApp, Discord, Slack
Heartbeat Autonomy: Runs 24/7 without human intervention

projects.title: Slack Mention Analyst + Inbox Declutter
projects.description: An intelligent Slack companion that monitors mentions, synthesizes context, and transforms messy conversations into clear action items.
features: Contextual Analysis: Understands the 'Why' of a mention
Web Research: Performs brief research for external info
Task Breakdown: Structured to-do list sent to DMs
Inbox Declutter: Prioritized summary of unreads

projects.title: Self-Improving AI Sales Agent v1
projects.description: A database-driven outreach system that identifies decision-makers, conducts deep research, and executes personalized email campaigns.
features: Decision-Maker Identification: Finds the right contact
Automated Research: Gathers company news and bios
Personalized Copy: Crafts 1-to-1 emails at scale
Continuous Learning: Refines pitch based on replies

projects.title: Live Stock Analysis & Reporting Dashboard
projects.description: A high-speed market intelligence view that combines technical signals, social sentiment, and AI summaries into a single real-time dashboard.
features: Live Price Action: Real-time candlestick data
Sentiment Engine: Scans Twitter and Reddit
AI Signal Synthesis: Technical + Social data merging

projects.title: Meeting Intelligence Assistant
projects.description: A personalized agent that 'listens in' to meetings, automatically generates tailored reports and summaries, and distributes them via email.

projects.title: Automated Job Application Processor
projects.description: AI-powered workflow that automates job application handling, candidate analysis, and Google Sheets integration.

projects.title: Intelligent Lead Generation Workflow
projects.description: AI Vision-based scraping for business info, automated reporting, and personalized email crafting.

projects.title: Automatic File-Sorting System
projects.description: Multi-modal file sorting powerhouse that transforms chaos into order with intelligent analysis and dynamic classification.

projects.title: Automated Social Media Content Manager
projects.description: Human-in-the-loop content manager using fine-tuned AI image models and automated scheduling.

projects.title: RSS Meta Automation
projects.description: Automatic content creator using RSS feeds and AI agents to generate optimized social media posts.
